# Cheese Client

Cheese Client is a **free, open-source Minecraft enhancement suite** (often referred to as a "hacked client") designed to elevate gameplay with advanced combat, movement, visual, and performance features. It is not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft.

- **Project Type:** Minecraft Utility Mod
- **License:** Open Source (GitHub)
- **Core Philosophy:** Free forever, community-driven, transparent development.

## Key Features

Cheese Client offers a wide array of modules to enhance your Minecraft experience, including:

- **Combat:** Advanced systems like KillAura, Aim Assist, and Velocity control for PvP dominance.
- **Movement:** Enhanced mobility with Flight, Speed, Parkour assistance, and NoFall.
- **Visuals:** ESP, X-Ray, Fullbright, and Tracers to improve situational awareness.
- **Performance:** FPS boost and optimization tools for smoother gameplay.
- **Utility:** Auto-totem, inventory management, and scaffolding for building.
- **Stealth:** Advanced anti-detection systems (bypasses for Matrix, Grim AC, Vulcan) and a "behavioral mimicry engine" to appear human-like.

For a complete list, see the [Features](features.html) page.

## Getting Started

### Download
The client is **100% free** with no hidden costs or premium tiers.
- Download the latest version from the [Download](download.html) page.
- The direct download link is: `https://github.com/Cheese-Client/Cheese-Client/releases/download/file/Cheese-client.zip`

### Installation
1.  Download the `Cheese-client.zip` file.
2.  Create a `CheeseClient` folder in your Minecraft versions directory.
3.  Extract the ZIP contents into the `CheeseClient` folder.
4.  Select the Cheese Client version from your Minecraft launcher and launch.

For detailed help, refer to the [Installation FAQ](faq.html#installation).

## Recent Major Updates

- **v3.2 (July 2025):** Introduced a **Visual Scripting API**, allowing users to create custom module behaviors with a node-based editor—no coding required.
- **v3.1 (May 2025):** Achieved **Fabric and Forge mod compatibility**, allowing users to run mods from both ecosystems simultaneously.
- **v3.0 (April 2025):** A complete ground-up rewrite featuring a new rendering engine, up to 200% performance improvement, and a behavioral mimicry engine for enhanced stealth.

Full changelog is available on the [Changelog](changelog.html) page.

## Community & Support

- **News:** Stay updated with announcements and technical deep-dives on the [News](news.html) page.
- **FAQ:** Find answers to common questions about usage, safety, and troubleshooting on the [FAQ](faq.html) page.
- **Source Code:** The project is open source and available on GitHub.

## Legal Information

Cheese Client is an independent project and is **not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected** with Mojang AB, Microsoft Corporation, or any of their subsidiaries.

The software is provided "AS IS" without warranty. Users are responsible for complying with the rules of the servers they join.
